headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers

headline: 4 AI Semiconductor Supply-Chain Stocks to Buy on the Recent Dip
summary: TER, FORM, AMKR and CRDO decline about 30% in a month, but AI chip testing, packaging and high-speed connectivity demand may support a recovery.

headline: AMC Entertainment, IREN, Hut 8 And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Monday
summary: U.S. stocks saw mixed results, with Nasdaq up 150 points. AMC shares rose after beating earnings expectations. Other big gainers include NUAI, IREN, XNCR, HUT, CIFR, CLSK, NUVB, AXTI, ATEX, APLD, and CHRN.
